headline: Sherwin-Williams Ties AI Data Center Coatings Push To SHW Valuation
summary: Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) released a comprehensive Data Center Facility Guide focused on coatings for AI-driven data center infrastructure. The guide highlights engineered coating systems designed for high power, high cooling, and high performance mission-critical environments. The launch targets hyperscale data centers and modular construction projects as AI-related buildouts expand globally. Sherwin-Williams, best known for paints and coatings across commercial and industrial markets,...
